title: Department of Political Science and International Relations (English) - About The Department
content:
Department of Political Science and International Relations (English) - About The Department

Mission

of the Department is to meet employment requirement of private and public sectors as well as to bring qualified stuff in academic life through equipping its students with analytical and inter-disciplinary comprehension skills.

Instructional vision

of the Department is to educate its students so as to acquire the ability to question and think critically, to be open to alternative viewpoints and be able to gain teamwork skills. For that purpose, the Department supports interdisciplinary and deepened accumulation of knowledge.

Fundamental objective

of the Department is to provide a balanced and multidimensional instruction. In addition to political science, the students are supposed to be capable of making comprehensive research in the fields such as the European Union, theories of international relations, migration and citizenship, foreign policy, political economy, democratization, human rights, equality and social justice, gender and identity politics.

Why study Political Science and International Relations in Istanbul Esenyurt University?

The Department of Political Science and International Relations in Istanbul Esenyurt University offers a deepened and interdisciplinary instruction program. An interdisciplinary approach provides the students with perfection and competency as well as a well-established cultural infrastructure.

Students gain the ability to make analysis in local, national, and international level thanks to knowledge-rich curriculum handling politics and international relations within their interrelationships with other disciplines such as sociology, law, economics, statistics, psychology, history, philosophy, linguistics, anthropology. In-depth instructional program, on the other hand, supports the specialization of the students. In addition, during their education, students engage in scientific readings and academic studies in compliance with their interest areas and they work on their projects in the selected subject. Academic stuff of the Department is comprised of scholars qualified in developing new interdisciplinary methods and is competent and innovative with the purpose of increasing the efficiency of the education.

Purpose of the Department:

To provide those who are seeking a career and specialization in domestic politics, foreign policy, political science, local administrations, private and public institutions and organizations with professional and academic knowledge and;

Training academicians intended for local and foreign high education institutions,

Providing qualified stuff for domestic and foreign think tanks in the field of domestic and foreign policy,

Training qualified experts for local and foreign public institutions and organizations,

Providing experts and administrators for especially Foreign and Internal Affairs Ministries as well as other public institutions and organizations.

Job Opportunities

Academic, administrative and consultancy positions in public institutions, international organizations, non-governmental organizations, think tanks and private sector:

Ministry of Internal Affairs,

Ministry of Foreign Affairs,

Directorate General for EU Affairs,

Local Administrations,

Other ministries and public institutions,

Administrative judicature,

Manager in private sector,

International organizations,

Local and international non-governmental organizations,

Mass media institutions,

Multinational/Transnational corporations,

International Banks,

Academician.

This content was updated on 05/09/2024.
